commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Slack QA-Lab live canary diagnostics to ping/pong RTT tracing, adds gateway RSS and heap checkpoint telemetry, reduces canary reaction noise, and adds focused Convex workflow controls for Slack runs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a maintainer QA diagnostic PR, not a reported product bug. Current main shows the Slack canary RTT is observer-based, and the PR changes that path, but no user bug reproduction is required.
commands.review_followup: No narrow automated repair is indicated; maintainers should finish or inspect the promised live Slack proof and decide whether the workflow automation risk is acceptable.

target.title: test(qa-lab): trace Slack RTT ping pong
target.body:
Summary
- Switch the Slack live canary to a ping/pong marker and measure RTT from Slack accepted timestamps when available.
- Record observer lag, poll counts, gateway RSS samples, and optional heap checkpoints for Slack live runs.
- Remove non-reply reaction traffic from the Slack QA canary config.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-gateway.runtime.test.ts
- node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-gateway.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts CHANGELOG.md
- git diff --check

Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Slack QA canary RTT was measuring harness observer latency instead of Slack accepted ping/pong timing.
Real environment tested: Local unit proof only so far; Convex-backed Slack live proof will run after this draft PR exists.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/shared/live-gateway.runtime.test.ts
Evidence after fix: 2 test files passed, 17 tests passed.
Observed result after fix: Slack helper tests verify ping/pong canary text, low-noise config, accepted timestamp capture, and skipped thread polling for top-level replies.
What was not tested: Secret-backed Slack live canary and openclaw-rtt dashboard import are pending.
target.author: vincentkoc
